qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: Consider the following two statements. : Destination address of an reply is a broadcast address. : Destination address of an request is a broadcast address. Which one of the following choices is correct? A. Both and are true B. is true and is false C. is false and is true D. Both and are false
